title: Test case for interfaces with incorrect localparam values (#3858)

features.name: interface parameterized localparam
features.description: Code should include an interface definition with a parameter and a localparam computed from that parameter
features.snippet: interface SimpleIntf#(parameter int symbolsPerBeat = 16); localparam int symbolsPerBeatDivBy2 = symbolsPerBeat/2; endinterface

features.name: multiple interface instantiations with different parameters
features.description: Code should include multiple instantiations of the same interface type with different parameter values

features.name: interface localparam access via interface reference
features.description: Code should include a submodule that receives an interface and accesses its localparam via the interface reference
features.snippet: module Core(SimpleIntf intf); localparam v = intf.symbolsPerBeatDivBy2; endmodule
